log.intro: Tap an adjacent tile to move. Reach the amber points.
log.resumed: You continue where you left off.
log.sepulchralCall: A chill runs through you: the mage calls the nearby undead.
log.levelMissing: The path continues, but nothing has been built beyond here yet.
over.winText: You leave the room with {gold} ◆ and your breath intact.
over.loseText: Darkness closes in. The room keeps its secrets.
set.title: Settings
log.hitFoeCrit.2: Precise strike! A critical hit leaves {name} at −{dmg}.
log.hitFoeCrit.3: Perfect impact! {name} takes {dmg} devastating damage.
log.hitHero.1: {name} hits you hard for {dmg} damage.
log.combatStart.1: Bones rattle! An enemy has spotted you.
log.combatStart.2: The air turns cold: someone else has entered combat.
log.combatStart.3: Careful! An enemy is closing in for the attack.
log.combatEnd.2: No enemies left standing. You walk on in peace.
log.combatEnd.3: The threat has passed... for now.
log.combatEnd.4: You lower your weapon: the immediate danger has faded.
log.heroDeath.2: Your story ends here, among the graves.
confirm.reset.title: Restart level?
confirm.reset.text: You'll lose your progress in this level and start over from the beginning.
confirm.quit.title: Quit the game?
confirm.quit.text: This will try to close this tab. If your browser blocks it, close it yourself to exit.
log.cantClose: Couldn't close automatically. Close the tab or app to exit.
ev.cofre.title: Sealed chest
ev.cofre.text: An iron chest reeks of rust and something sweet. The latch gives if you insist… but the metal is warm, as if something breathes inside.
ev.cofre.c0.r: Coins and a tooth. You shut it fast.
ev.cofre.c1.r: Something bites, but you pull out a fistful of gold.
ev.altar.title: Cracked altar
ev.altar.text: A vein of ember pulses beneath the broken stone. It offers warmth for blood, or silence for nothing.
ev.altar.c1.r: The shard glows faintly in your bag.
ev.altar.c2.r: The altar goes dark behind you.
log.skillOutOfRange: Out of range for that skill.
log.noEventYet: There doesn't seem to be anything here yet.
log.corpseTooFar: You need to get closer to the corpse to loot it.
loot.title: Loot
ev.palanca.title: Rusted lever
ev.palanca.text: It juts from the wall, half-sunk in rust. Something, somewhere, is waiting to be moved.
ev.palanca.c0.r: Something gives way in the distance. A coin pouch drops through a chute.
ev.orbe.title: Suspended orb
ev.orbe.text: It floats still above a pedestal, dust-free, as if time didn't dare touch it.
ev.orbe.hint: It casts no shadow. That's either a bad sign, or no sign at all.
ev.orbe.c0.r: A brief warmth runs up your arm. It feels good.
ev.orbe.c1.r: The orb resists, then yields. Costly, but it yields.
ev.orbe.c2.r: You leave it floating. Let someone else wonder why.
ev.mesa.title: Work table
ev.mesa.text: Rusted tools, a half-drawn map, and notes that mean nothing to anyone living anymore.
ev.mesa.hint: Someone spent hours here. Doesn't look like they left in a hurry.
ev.mesa.c0.r: Coins used as paperweights, hidden among the notes.
ev.mesa.c1.r: Whatever it was, it's not your business anymore.
ev.palanca1.title: Stone lever
ev.palanca1.hint: A stone mechanism, covered in lichen.
ev.palanca1.question: Do you want to pull the lever?
ev.palanca1.result: You pull the lever and hear a mechanism release somewhere. The sound comes from the crypts ahead of you…
ev.exit1.title: The cemetery gate
ev.exit1.hint: A great stone gate, left ajar.
ev.exit1.question: Leave towards the Crypt?
ev.exit2.title: The cemetery gate
ev.exit2.hint: A great stone gate, left ajar.
ev.exit2.question: Leave towards the Crypt?
ev.exit3.title: Entrance to the first mausoleum
ev.exit3.hint: A stone entrance, half covered in ivy.
ev.exit3.question: Enter the mausoleum?
ev.exit3.blockedHint: It's sealed. Some nearby mechanism might open it.
ev.exit4.title: Entrance to the second mausoleum
ev.exit4.hint: A stone entrance, half covered in ivy.
ev.exit4.question: Enter the mausoleum?
ev.exit4.blockedHint: It's sealed. Some nearby mechanism might open it.
ev.trampa.title: Unstable slab
ev.trampa.hint: Something about this floor doesn't sit right.
ev.trampa.text: The slab gives way under your weight and something fires from the wall.
ev.trampa.disarmQuestion: Want to try disarming it with your nonexistent expertise?
ev.trampa.disarmSuccess: More luck than skill: you take it apart without it going off.
ev.trampa.disarmFail: Your hand slips and the mechanism triggers. −{dmg}
ev.evento1.text: You hear strange noises coming from further ahead. A chill runs down your spine…
ev.tumba.title: Mossy headstone
ev.tumba.hint: An old grave covered in moss.
ev.tumba.text: The soil is loose and disturbed. Something glints among the roots.
ev.tumba.c0.r: A few old coins among the bones.
ev.cripta.title: Sealed door
ev.cripta.hint: A stone crypt with its door shut.
ev.cripta.text: The door is barred with rusted chains. It won't budge for now.
splash.title: What's new
skillshop.title: Choose your skills
skillshop.subtitle: Test system — spend your gold on the skills available.
confirm.finishShop.title: Finish and start the run?
confirm.finishShop.text: You won't be able to return to the skill shop until you restart the run.
confirm.resetShop.title: Reset skill progress?
confirm.resetShop.text: You'll lose every skill bought and gold will go back to 1000.
skill.butcher_precision.name: Butcher's Precision
skill.faith_strikes.name: Faith Strikes
skill.faith_strikes.desc: Melee physical damage has a chance to heal you for part of it.
skill.faith_strikes.tier1: 15% chance to heal 25% of melee damage dealt.
skill.faith_strikes.tier2: 30% chance to heal 25% of melee damage dealt.
skill.faith_strikes.tier3: 45% chance to heal 25% of melee damage dealt.
skill.flame_slash.name: Flame Slash
skill.flame_slash.desc: A weapon strike wrapped in fire that burns the enemy for a few turns after the hit.
skill.flame_slash.tier3: High fire damage, long burn, and some area around the target.
skill.iron_skin.name: Iron Skin
skill.iron_skin.desc: Permanently hardens the hero's skin, reducing physical damage taken.
skill.frost_arrow.name: Frost Arrow
skill.frost_arrow.desc: Fires a chilling arrow at range that briefly slows the enemy.
skill.frost_arrow.tier1: Low ice damage; slows for 1 turn.
skill.frost_arrow.tier2: More ice damage; slows for 2 turns.
skill.frost_arrow.tier3: High ice damage; slows for 2 turns and may fully freeze the target.
skill.poison_cloud.name: Poison Cloud
skill.poison_cloud.desc: Throws a vial that bursts into a toxic cloud, poisoning everything caught inside.
skill.poison_cloud.tier1: Light poison over a small area.
skill.poison_cloud.tier2: More poison and a bit more area.
skill.poison_cloud.tier3: Heavy poison over a large area, lasting more turns.
skill.holy_smite.name: Holy Smite
skill.holy_smite.desc: A melee strike charged with holy light, especially damaging to the undead.
skill.holy_smite.tier3: High holy damage, with a chance to briefly stun.
skill.war_cry.name: War Cry
skill.war_cry.desc: A roar that inspires courage: increases your own damage for a few turns.
skill.cat_reflexes.name: Cat Reflexes
skill.cat_reflexes.desc: Sharpens the hero's reflexes, increasing the chance to dodge attacks.
skill.bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
skill.bloodlust.desc: Every enemy defeated feeds the hero's fury, increasing damage for the rest of the fight.
skill.bloodlust.tier1: + light damage per kill (doesn't carry between fights).
